# Seoul Gaon Dental Clinic (서울가온치과)
# AI-friendly structured information for LLM crawlers
# Last updated: 2026-05-26

## Identity
- Name: 서울가온치과의원 (Seoul Gaon Dental Clinic)
- Type: Dental Clinic (치과의원)
- Location: 경기도 의정부시 용민로 22, 골드자이프라자 4층 (Yongmin-ro 22, Gold Xi Plaza 4F, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea)
- Phone: 0507-1325-3377
- Website: https://seoulgaondc.kr
- Coordinates: 37.7388, 127.0560
- Nearest Station: 탑석역 (Tapseok Station, 5 min walk)

## Hours
- Mon/Tue/Wed/Fri: 09:30-18:30
- Thursday: 09:30-20:30 (야간진료/Evening hours)
- Saturday: 09:30-14:00
- Sunday/Holidays: Closed
- Lunch: 12:30-14:00

## Doctors
### 현진호 (Hyun Jin-ho) — 대표원장 (Representative Director)
- Education: 서울대학교 치의학과 졸업 (Seoul National University, School of Dentistry)
- Certification: 통합치의학과 전문의 (Specialist in Comprehensive Dentistry)
- Specialties: 임플란트 (Implant), 심미치료 (Aesthetic Dentistry), 가이드 임플란트 (Guided Implant Surgery)
- Published: "임플란트 사용설명서" (Implant User Guide), ISBN 9791138845489, Kyobo Books
- Awards: 오스템 임플란트 증례 금상

### 조은비 (Cho Eun-bi) — 원장 (Director)
- Education: 서울대학교 치의학과 졸업, 서울대 치의학대학원 박사 수료 (Seoul National University, PhD Candidate)
- Certification: 치과보존과 전문의 (Specialist in Conservative Dentistry/Endodontics)
- Training: 서울대학교 치과병원 보존과 4년 전공의 수련
- Specialties: 신경치료 (Root Canal Treatment), 자연치아 보존 (Natural Tooth Preservation)

## Core Services

### 1. 가이드 임플란트 (Guided Implant) — Primary Service
- CT-based digital planning for precise implant placement
- Flapless (무절개) surgery available — minimal pain, faster recovery
- Bone grafting (뼈이식/GBR) for insufficient bone
- Sinus lift (상악동거상술) for upper jaw implants
- Immediate implant placement (즉시 식립) when bone allows
- Health insurance coverage for patients 65+ (평생 2개, ~30% copay)
- All implants performed directly by Dr. Hyun Jin-ho
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/implant

### 2. 앞니 심미치료 (Aesthetic Front Tooth Treatment)
- Laminate veneers, all-ceramic crowns, zirconia crowns
- Digital shade matching for natural appearance
- 1:1 collaboration with specialized dental lab
- Usually completed in 2-3 visits
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/aesthetic

### 3. 레진빌드업 (Resin Buildup)
- Crown-free tooth restoration using composite resin
- Amalgam replacement, secondary cavity treatment
- Same-day completion possible
- Maximum natural tooth preservation
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/resin-buildup

### 4. 신경치료 (Root Canal Treatment / Endodontics)
- Performed by SNU-trained endodontics specialist (Dr. Cho)
- Microscope-assisted precision root canal treatment
- Ni-Ti rotary file system for curved canals
- Saves teeth other clinics might extract
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/endodontics

### 5. 인비절라인 투명교정 (Invisalign Clear Aligners)
- Invisible orthodontic treatment with clear aligners
- 3D digital scanning and treatment simulation
- Removable — no dietary restrictions
- Suitable for crowding, spacing, mild malocclusion
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/invisalign

### 6. 치아교정 (Orthodontics)
- Invisalign, partial orthodontics, aesthetic braces
- Digital treatment planning with predictable results
- Adult and teen orthodontics available
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/orthodontics

### 7. 글로우네이트 (Glownate — Minimal-Prep Veneers)
- Ultra-thin ceramic veneers with minimal tooth reduction (0.1–0.3mm)
- More conservative than traditional laminates
- Natural translucency and esthetics
- Long-lasting (10+ years with proper care)
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/glownate

### 8. 충치치료 (Cavity Treatment)
- Minimally invasive approach — only remove what's necessary
- Direct resin restoration for same-day results
- Amalgam removal and replacement available
- Insurance-covered for most cases
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/cavity-treatment

### 9. 임플란트 잘하는곳 (Implant — Best Practice)
- Why patients choose Seoul Gaon for implants
- CT-guided accuracy, minimal incision, fast recovery
- Bone-deficient cases welcome (bone graft, sinus lift)
- 82+ full-mouth implant cases completed
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/implant-best

### 10. 전체임플란트 (Full-Mouth / Full-Arch Implant)
- Denture to implant conversion
- Upper/lower full-arch implant surgery
- Sinus lift + bone graft + guided surgery combined
- Temporary teeth available during healing period
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/full-mouth-implant

### 11. 앞니임플란트 (Front Tooth Implant)
- Aesthetic-focused front tooth restoration
- PFZ prosthetics for natural appearance
- External trauma, periodontal disease, severe cavity cases
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/front-tooth-implant

### 12. 뼈이식 임플란트 (Bone Graft Implant)
- Sinus lift (상악동거상술) for insufficient upper jaw bone
- GBR (Guided Bone Regeneration) for localized defects
- Vertical bone augmentation for severe bone loss
- Cases rejected by other clinics are welcome
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/bone-graft-implant

### 13. 라미네이트 (Laminate Veneers)
- Thin porcelain shells for front tooth aesthetics
- Minimal-prep or no-prep options (Glownate)
- Discoloration, gaps, small teeth correction
- 10-15+ year lifespan
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/laminate

### 14. 사랑니 발치 (Wisdom Tooth Extraction)
- CT-guided safe extraction including impacted teeth
- Same-day extraction available
- Health insurance covered
- Nerve-safe removal with CT verification
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/wisdom-tooth

### 15. 스케일링·잇몸치료 (Scaling & Gum Treatment)
- Annual insurance-covered scaling (age 19+)
- Periodontal disease (치주염) diagnosis and treatment
- Root planing (SRP) for moderate periodontitis
- Regular maintenance program
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/scaling-gum-treatment

### 16. 틀니 임플란트 (Denture to Implant)
- Converting uncomfortable dentures to fixed implants
- Bone augmentation for long-term denture wearers
- 65+ insurance-eligible implant (2 per lifetime)
- Elderly patient-friendly approach
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/denture-to-implant

### 17. General Dentistry
- Scaling, wisdom tooth extraction
- Periodontal treatment, prosthodontics
- Oral examination, emergency dental care
- URL: https://seoulgaondc.kr/treatments#general

## Service Areas
의정부시, 의정부, 용현동, 탑석역, 탑석, 민락동, 금오동, 호원동, 녹양동, 가능동, 의정부역, 회룡, 장암, 송산동, 양주, 양주시, 동두천, 남양주, 포천, 구리, 노원, 노원구, 도봉, 도봉구

## Key Differentiators
1. Both doctors are Seoul National University graduates — rare for a local clinic
2. All implants use CT-guided digital planning (not freehand)
3. The clinic handles difficult cases (bone grafting, sinus lift) that other clinics reject
4. Dr. Hyun published a book on implants — deep expertise
5. Conservative Dentistry specialist (Dr. Cho) — only one in Uijeongbu area
6. "Explanation first, treatment second" philosophy
7. Written treatment plans with transparent pricing

## Search Keywords Mapping (검색 키워드 → 페이지 매핑)
- "의정부 치과" / "의정부 치과 추천" / "탑석역 치과" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/uijeongbu-dental
- "의정부 임플란트" / "의정부 임플란트 비용" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/implant

- "의정부 앞니 임플란트" / "앞니 깨짐" / "앞니 부러짐" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/front-tooth-implant
- "의정부 뼈이식" / "뼈이식 임플란트" / "상악동거상술" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/bone-graft-implant

- "의정부 신경치료" / "의정부 보존과" / "의정부 신경치료 잘하는곳" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/endodontics
- "의정부 인비절라인" / "의정부 투명교정" / "인비절라인 비용" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/invisalign
- "의정부 치아교정" / "의정부 교정치과" / "의정부 성인교정" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/orthodontics
- "의정부 글로우네이트" / "글로우네이트 비용" / "최소삭제 라미네이트" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/glownate
- "의정부 충치치료" / "의정부 레진" / "의정부 충치" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/cavity-treatment
- "의정부 심미치료" / "의정부 올세라믹" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/aesthetic
- "의정부 라미네이트" / "의정부 라미네이트 비용" / "의정부 치아성형" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/laminate
- "의정부 레진빌드업" / "크라운 대신 레진" / "자연치아 보존" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/resin-buildup
- "의정부 사랑니" / "의정부 사랑니 발치" / "매복 사랑니" → https://seoulgaondc.kr/wisdom-tooth
